title: Penal Code 1871 - Theft offences
text: Singapore Statutes Online hosts the Penal Code 1871, including provisions for theft and related property offences. Use the current statute text on SSO as the authoritative source before citing exact sections or penalties.

title: Singapore Judiciary - Small Claims Tribunals
text: The Singapore Judiciary provides public guidance on Small Claims Tribunals, including the types of civil claims they can hear and the process for filing or responding to a claim.

title: Legal Aid Bureau - Applying for legal aid
text: The Legal Aid Bureau explains how eligible persons may apply for civil legal aid in Singapore. Eligibility is generally assessed through means and merits tests.

title: Singapore Judiciary - Criminal cases
text: The Singapore Judiciary publishes public information about criminal court processes, including attending court, mentions, trials, sentencing, and related procedural guidance.
